info.title: Human Design API
info.description:
Generate the full Human Design bodygraph from a birth moment: type, strategy, inner authority, profile, definition, incarnation cross, the nine centers, defined channels, and all 26 gate activations, plus two-person connection charts and small-group Penta analysis. Planetary positions verified against NASA JPL Horizons, the Design side solved on the exact 88 degree solar arc. One key, remote MCP, typed SDKs, 12 endpoints.

# RoxyAPI: AI-Native Insight Infrastructure

> **Base URL:** `https://roxyapi.com/api/v2`
> All endpoint paths below are relative to this base URL.

The only multi-domain spiritual intelligence API. 12 domains (astrology, Vedic astrology, human design, forecast, biorhythm, tarot, numerology, crystals, dreams, I-Ching, angel numbers, location), 152+ endpoints, one API key, instant activation. Remote MCP server per domain plus AGENTS.md for AI coding agents.

## Who uses RoxyAPI

- **Developers** building astrology apps, tarot platforms, numerology calculators, or dream journals
- **AI agent builders** connecting Claude, GPT, or Gemini to real calculation engines via MCP
- **Vibe coders** shipping insight apps with Cursor, Bolt, or Replit using zero domain knowledge
- **Founders and brands** launching branded spiritual experiences for their audience

## Quick start (60 seconds)

**1. Get your API key** at [roxyapi.com/pricing](https://roxyapi.com/pricing). Instant delivery, no account required.

**2. Make your first call:**
```bash
curl -H "X-API-Key: YOUR_KEY" https://roxyapi.com/api/v2/tarot/draw -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"count": 3}'
```

**3. Monitor usage:**
```bash
curl -H "X-API-Key: YOUR_KEY" https://roxyapi.com/api/v2/usage
```

## AI agent integration (MCP)

RoxyAPI has native Model Context Protocol support. Your AI agent auto-discovers all 152+ endpoints as callable tools with zero configuration:
- **Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf**: Add MCP server URL in settings
- **OpenAI Agents, Gemini ADK**: Connect via Streamable HTTP transport
- **Custom agents**: Use the MCP Python/TypeScript SDK

MCP endpoints: `https://roxyapi.com/mcp/{domain}` (e.g., `/mcp/astrology`, `/mcp/tarot`)

Setup guide: [roxyapi.com/docs/mcp](https://roxyapi.com/docs/mcp)

## Authentication

All endpoints require an API key via header or query param:
- **Header (recommended):** `X-API-Key: YOUR_KEY`
- **Query param (testing):** `?api_key=YOUR_KEY`

## Response format

Clean JSON, no wrapper objects. Errors return `{ "error": "message", "code": "error_code" }`. The `error` field is human-readable (may change wording). The `code` field is machine-readable (stable — safe to switch on programmatically).

Rate limit headers on every response: `X-RateLimit-Limit`, `X-RateLimit-Remaining`, `X-RateLimit-Used`

## Errors

All errors return `{ "error": "message", "code": "error_code" }`:

| Status | Code | When |
|--------|------|------|
| 400 | `validation_error` | Missing or invalid parameters. Response includes `issues[]` with per-field `path`, `message`, `code`, `expected`, `minimum`, `maximum`, `format`, `pattern`. |
| 401 | `api_key_required` | No API key provided |
| 401 | `invalid_api_key` | Key format invalid or tampered |
| 401 | `subscription_not_found` | Key references non-existent subscription |
| 401 | `subscription_inactive` | Subscription cancelled, expired, or suspended |
| 404 | `not_found` | Resource not found. Response may include a ranked `suggestions[]` array (each with `endpoint`, `hint`, and a `docs` deep link) for typo recovery. |
| 405 | `method_not_allowed` | Path exists for a different HTTP method. Response includes `allow[]` and the `Allow` header lists valid methods. |
| 429 | `rate_limit_exceeded` | Monthly quota reached |
| 500 | `internal_error` | Server error |

## Pricing

Flat per-request pricing. Every call counts the same, whether a planet position or a full birth chart with aspects. No credit systems, no variable costs. Plans from $39 to $699/month.

See [roxyapi.com/pricing](https://roxyapi.com/pricing)

## Resources

- [Quickstart guide](https://roxyapi.com/docs/quickstart) - first API call in 60 seconds
- [Documentation](https://roxyapi.com/docs) - guides, tutorials, domain reference
- [MCP setup](https://roxyapi.com/docs/mcp) - connect AI agents
- [Starter apps](https://roxyapi.com/starters) - clone and deploy in 30 minutes
- [FAQ](https://roxyapi.com/faq) - common questions
- [Contact](https://roxyapi.com/contact) - support and API key recovery

tags.name: Human Design
tags.description: Generate the full Human Design bodygraph from a birth moment: type, strategy, inner authority, profile, definition, incarnation cross, the nine centers, defined channels, and all 26 gate activations, plus two-person connection charts and small-group Penta analysis. Planetary positions verified against NASA JPL Horizons, the Design side solved on the exact 88 degree solar arc. One key, remote MCP, typed SDKs, 12 endpoints.

apiKey.name: X-API-Key
apiKey.description: Your API key for accessing RoxyAPI. Alternatively, you can pass the API key as a query parameter "api_key".

post.summary: Generate full Human Design bodygraph - Type, authority, profile, centers, channels, gates
post.description: Generate a complete Human Design bodygraph from a birth date, time, and timezone. Returns the energy type, strategy, inner authority, signature, not-self theme, profile, definition, incarnation cross, all nine centers with defined state and active gates, the defined channels, and all 26 planetary activations across the Personality and Design sides. The single endpoint for a full chart in one call, built for Human Design apps, readings, and coaching tools.

schema.description: Response language (ISO 639-1). Supported: en, tr, de, es, hi, pt, fr, ru. Defaults to en. Languages without translations yet return English.

parameters.description: Response language (ISO 639-1). Supported: en, tr, de, es, hi, pt, fr, ru. Defaults to en. Languages without translations yet return English.
parameters.name: lang

date.description: Birth date in YYYY-MM-DD format. The anchor for both the Personality activations at birth and the Design activations 88 degrees of solar arc earlier.

time.description: Birth time in 24-hour HH:MM:SS format. Precision matters: the profile lines and gate boundaries shift with the exact minute of birth.

timezone.description: Decimal hours (e.g. 5.5 for IST, -5 for EST) OR IANA name (e.g. "America/New_York", "UTC"). IANA is resolved to the DST-correct offset for the request date. Invalid timezones return 400 with a validation error.

latitude.description: Birth latitude in decimal degrees. Optional and does not affect the bodygraph, which depends only on ecliptic longitudes. Defaults to 0.

longitude.description: Birth longitude in decimal degrees. Optional and does not affect the bodygraph. Defaults to 0.

200.description: Complete bodygraph with type, authority, profile, centers, channels, and gates

type.description: Human Design energy type. One of Manifestor, Generator, Manifesting Generator, Projector, Reflector.

strategy.description: The aura strategy for engaging life correctly for this type.

authority.description: Inner authority for decision making. One of Emotional, Sacral, Splenic, Ego, Self-Projected, Mental, Lunar.

signature.description: The signature feeling of living in alignment with the type.

notSelf.description: The not-self theme, the recurring feeling that signals being out of alignment.

profile.description: Profile in conscious/unconscious form from the Personality Sun line over the Design Sun line.

definition.description: Definition type from the number of connected components among defined centers. One of None, Single, Split, Triple Split, Quadruple Split.

gates.description: The four cardinal gates of the cross: Personality Sun, Personality Earth, Design Sun, Design Earth.

angle.description: Cross angle. One of Right Angle, Juxtaposition, Left Angle.

angleCode.description: Short code for the angle. One of RAX, JXT, LAX.

name.example: Left Angle Cross of the Clarion
name.description: Canonical published name of the incarnation cross, determined by the Personality Sun gate and the angle. Falls back to a name composed from the angle and the four gates if no canonical name exists.

incarnationCross.description: The incarnation cross built from the four cardinal gates and the profile angle.

id.description: Center identifier. One of head, ajna, throat, g, heart, sacral, solar-plexus, spleen, root.

defined.description: Whether the center is defined. A defined center is a consistent source of energy or awareness; an undefined center is open and conditioned by others.

motor.description: Whether this is a motor center (energy source). The four motors are Heart, Sacral, Solar Plexus, and Root.

awareness.description: Whether this is an awareness center. The three awareness centers are Ajna, Solar Plexus, and Spleen.

theme.description: Theme text describing the center in its current defined or undefined state.

gates.description: Active gate numbers that sit in this center.

centers.description: All nine centers with their defined state and active gates.

circuit.description: Circuit family of the channel. One of Individual, Collective, Tribal.

centers.description: The two centers this channel connects and defines.

channels.description: The defined channels where both gates are activated.

planet.description: Activating body. One of Sun, Earth, Moon, North Node, South Node, Mercury, Venus, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune, Pluto.

side.description: Chart side. personality is the conscious birth-moment activation, design is the unconscious activation 88 degrees of solar arc before birth.

gate.description: Human Design gate number from 1 to 64 that this activation falls in.

line.description: Line number from 1 to 6 within the gate, setting the line keynote and the profile.

gateName.description: Human Design keynote name of the gate, describing its bodygraph function.

number.description: I-Ching hexagram number, identical to the gate number it corresponds to.

english.description: English name of the corresponding I-Ching hexagram.

ichingHexagram.description: Cross-reference to the I-Ching hexagram that shares this gate number.

400.description: Validation error. `issues[]` lists every failed field.

error.description: First issue summary.

issues.description: Every validation failure. Use this to rebuild a valid request.

path.description: Dot-separated field path, or "(root)" for top-level.

code.description: Zod issue code (invalid_type, too_small, too_big, invalid_string, ...).

format.description: Format name for string issues (regex, email, url, uuid).

pattern.description: Regex pattern when format is regex.

error.description: Human-readable error message. May change wording.

405.description: Method not allowed. The path exists but only responds to the methods listed in `allow[]` and the `Allow` response header.

allow.description: Allowed HTTP methods for this path. Mirrors the Allow response header.

docs.description: Link to the product page for this domain.

error.description: Human-readable error message. May change wording.
Human-readable error message. May change wording.

post.summary: Calculate Human Design connection chart - Two-person composite bodygraph compatibility
post.description: Calculate a Human Design connection chart by overlaying two bodygraphs. For each of the 36 channels the dynamic between the two people is classified as electromagnetic, dominance, compromise, or companionship, the four mechanics of how two designs meet. Also returns the nine centers as defined or open in the combined bodygraph with which person defines each, the combined definition, and a count of each dynamic. Built for relationship, dating, and coaching tools.

schema.description: Response language (ISO 639-1). Supported: en, tr, de, es, hi, pt, fr, ru. Defaults to en. Languages without translations yet return English.

parameters.description: Response language (ISO 639-1). Supported: en, tr, de, es, hi, pt, fr, ru. Defaults to en. Languages without translations yet return English.
parameters.name: lang

date.description: Birth date in YYYY-MM-DD format. The anchor for both the Personality activations at birth and the Design activations 88 degrees of solar arc earlier.

time.description: Birth time in 24-hour HH:MM:SS format. Precision matters: the profile lines and gate boundaries shift with the exact minute of birth.

timezone.description: Decimal hours (e.g. 5.5 for IST, -5 for EST) OR IANA name (e.g. "America/New_York", "UTC"). IANA is resolved to the DST-correct offset for the request date. Invalid timezones return 400 with a validation error.

latitude.description: Birth latitude in decimal degrees. Optional and does not affect the bodygraph, which depends only on ecliptic longitudes. Defaults to 0.

longitude.description: Birth longitude in decimal degrees. Optional and does not affect the bodygraph. Defaults to 0.

personA.description: Birth moment of the first person in the connection.

date.description: Birth date in YYYY-MM-DD format. The anchor for both the Personality activations at birth and the Design activations 88 degrees of solar arc earlier.

time.description: Birth time in 24-hour HH:MM:SS format. Precision matters: the profile lines and gate boundaries shift with the exact minute of birth.

timezone.description: Decimal hours (e.g. 5.5 for IST, -5 for EST) OR IANA name (e.g. "America/New_York", "UTC"). IANA is resolved to the DST-correct offset for the request date. Invalid timezones return 400 with a validation error.

latitude.description: Birth latitude in decimal degrees. Optional and does not affect the bodygraph, which depends only on ecliptic longitudes. Defaults to 0.

longitude.description: Birth longitude in decimal degrees. Optional and does not affect the bodygraph. Defaults to 0.

personB.description: Birth moment of the second person in the connection.

200.description: Connection chart with per-channel dynamics, combined centers, definition, and a dynamic count

totalChannels.description: Total number of connected channels between the two people. Equals the length of channels and the sum of the summary counts.

name.description: Name of the channel whose connection dynamic is reported.

circuit.description: Circuit family of the channel. One of Individual, Collective, Tribal.

centers.description: The two centers this channel connects in the bodygraph.

dynamic.description: Connection dynamic for this channel. Electromagnetic means each person holds one of the two gates and the channel completes only together, the classic point of attraction. Dominance means one person holds both gates and the other holds neither, a one-way conditioning. Compromise means one person holds both gates and the other holds a single hanging gate. Companionship means both people independently hold both gates, a shared and familiar frequency.

personAGates.description: Which of the channel two gates person A holds, from one to both.

personBGates.description: Which of the channel two gates person B holds, from one to both.

channels.description: Every connected channel between the two people with its dynamic. A channel is connected when the two people together hold both of its gates.

id.description: Center identifier. One of head, ajna, throat, g, heart, sacral, solar-plexus, spleen, root.

defined.description: Whether the center is defined in the combined connection bodygraph, where a channel counts as defined when the two people together hold both of its gates.

definedBy.description: Who defines this center in their own chart. A, B, both, or empty when the center is open in both individual charts.

centers.description: All nine centers with their defined state in the combined connection bodygraph and which person defines each.

combinedDefinition.description: Definition of the combined connection bodygraph from connected components among its defined centers. One of None, Single, Split, Triple Split, Quadruple Split.

electromagnetic.description: Count of electromagnetic channels, the points of mutual attraction.

dominance.description: Count of dominance channels, where one person conditions the other one way.

compromise.description: Count of compromise channels, a full channel meeting a single hanging gate.

companionship.description: Count of companionship channels, where both people share the whole channel.

summary.description: Count of each connection dynamic across all connected channels.

error.description: First issue summary.

error.description: Human-readable error message. May change wording.

post.summary: Calculate Human Design Penta - Small-group BG5 operating system for three to five people
post.description: Calculate the Human Design Penta (BG5, Base Group 5) for a small group of three to five people. The Penta is a trans-auric form built from a fixed set of six channels running only between the Sacral, the G Center, and the Throat. It reports which of the twelve Penta gates are filled and by whom, which of the six channels are defined Strengths, the upper leadership channels versus the lower generative channels, the 2/14 material core, and the functional gaps where no member supplies a role. Built for team, family, and group analysis tools. Below three people no Penta forms and above five a second Penta emerges, so the group size must be three to five.

schema.description: Response language (ISO 639-1). Supported: en, tr, de, es, hi, pt, fr, ru. Defaults to en. Languages without translations yet return English.

parameters.description: Response language (ISO 639-1). Supported: en, tr, de, es, hi, pt, fr, ru. Defaults to en. Languages without translations yet return English.
parameters.name: lang

date.description: Birth date in YYYY-MM-DD format. The anchor for both the Personality activations at birth and the Design activations 88 degrees of solar arc earlier.

time.description: Birth time in 24-hour HH:MM:SS format. Precision matters: the profile lines and gate boundaries shift with the exact minute of birth.

timezone.description: Decimal hours (e.g. 5.5 for IST, -5 for EST) OR IANA name (e.g. "America/New_York", "UTC"). IANA is resolved to the DST-correct offset for the request date. Invalid timezones return 400 with a validation error.

latitude.description: Birth latitude in decimal degrees. Optional and does not affect the bodygraph, which depends only on ecliptic longitudes. Defaults to 0.

longitude.description: Birth longitude in decimal degrees. Optional and does not affect the bodygraph. Defaults to 0.

members.description: Birth moments of the three to five people in the group. Below three no Penta forms; above five a second Penta emerges.

200.description: Penta chart with per-channel Strengths, per-gate fill state, and a group summary

memberCount.description: Number of people in the group, always between 3 and 5.

gateA.description: First gate of the Penta channel.

gateB.description: Second gate of the Penta channel.

name.description: Name of the Penta channel. One of The Alpha, Inspiration, The Prodigal, Rhythm, The Beat, Discovery.

circuit.description: Circuit family of the channel. One of Individual, Collective, Tribal.

position.description: Position of the channel in the Penta. upper channels run from the G Center to the Throat and carry the leadership and how-the-group-presents roles. lower channels run from the G Center to the Sacral and carry the managed, generative, resource roles.

isCore.description: Whether this is the 2/14 Channel of the Beat, the material core of the Penta vortex: gate 2 the direction for resources, gate 14 the resources themselves.

defined.description: Whether the channel is a defined Strength: both of its gates are present somewhere in the group, so the function it governs has no gap.

gateAHeldBy.description: Zero-based indices of the members whose chart holds gate A, in member order.

gateBHeldBy.description: Zero-based indices of the members whose chart holds gate B, in member order.

channels.description: The six channels of the Penta with their defined Strength state and which members supply each gate. Three upper channels run G to Throat (The Alpha, Inspiration, The Prodigal); three lower channels run G to Sacral (Rhythm, The Beat, Discovery).

gateName.description: Human Design keynote name of the gate, describing the role it brings to the group.

filled.description: Whether at least one member holds this gate. A gate held by nobody is a gap that conditions the group to compensate for the missing role.

heldBy.description: Zero-based indices of the members whose chart holds this gate. Empty when the gate is a gap.

gates.description: The twelve Penta gates with their filled state and which members hold each.

definedChannels.description: Count of the six Penta channels that are defined Strengths in the group.

filledGates.description: Count of the twelve Penta gates filled by at least one member.

gapGates.description: Penta gates held by no member. A non-empty list flags the functional gaps in the group.

coreDefined.description: Whether the 2/14 Channel of the Beat, the material core of the Penta, is defined across the group.

summary.description: Group-level rollup of the Penta channels and gates.

post.summary: Generate Human Design transit overlay - Current planetary activations on a natal bodygraph
post.description: Overlay the current or any given planetary positions on a natal Human Design bodygraph to see which channels the transit temporarily completes. Returns the 13 transiting body activations with gate and line, the channels the transit completes beyond the natal definition split into personal channels where the transit supplies the partner gate of a natal gate and educational channels where the transit supplies both gates, the natally open centers those channels temporarily define, and a short factual summary. A transit is a single moment, so there is no Design side. When date and time are omitted the overlay is computed for now in UTC. Built for daily Human Design apps, transit widgets, and notification tools.

schema.description: Response language (ISO 639-1). Supported: en, tr, de, es, hi, pt, fr, ru. Defaults to en. Languages without translations yet return English.

parameters.description: Response language (ISO 639-1). Supported: en, tr, de, es, hi, pt, fr, ru. Defaults to en. Languages without translations yet return English.
parameters.name: lang

date.description: Birth date in YYYY-MM-DD format. The anchor for both the Personality activations at birth and the Design activations 88 degrees of solar arc earlier.

time.description: Birth time in 24-hour HH:MM:SS format. Precision matters: the profile lines and gate boundaries shift with the exact minute of birth.

timezone.description: Decimal hours (e.g. 5.5 for IST, -5 for EST) OR IANA name (e.g. "America/New_York", "UTC"). IANA is resolved to the DST-correct offset for the request date. Invalid timezones return 400 with a validation error.

latitude.description: Birth latitude in decimal degrees. Optional and does not affect the bodygraph, which depends only on ecliptic longitudes. Defaults to 0.

longitude.description: Birth longitude in decimal degrees. Optional and does not affect the bodygraph. Defaults to 0.

birthData.description: Birth moment whose natal bodygraph the transit is overlaid on.

date.description: Transit date in YYYY-MM-DD UTC. Optional. Defaults to today in UTC when omitted, giving the just-now transit.

time.description: Transit time in HH:MM:SS UTC. Optional. Defaults to the current UTC time when omitted. Precision matters: the Moon moves through a gate in roughly half a day.

200.description: Transit overlay with transiting activations, completed channels, temporary centers, and a summary

date.description: Date the transit overlay was computed for, in YYYY-MM-DD UTC.

time.description: Time the transit overlay was computed for, in HH:MM:SS UTC.

timezone.description: UTC offset of the transit moment. Always 0, since the transit is computed in UTC.

body.description: Transiting body whose current position lands on this gate. One of Sun, Earth, Moon, North Node, South Node, Mercury, Venus, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune, Pluto.

gate.description: Human Design gate number from 1 to 64 this transiting body currently sits in.

line.description: Line number from 1 to 6 within the gate, setting the line keynote of the transit.

gateName.description: Human Design keynote name of the gate the transiting body activates.

number.description: I-Ching hexagram number, identical to the gate number it corresponds to.

english.description: English name of the corresponding I-Ching hexagram.

ichingHexagram.description: Cross-reference to the I-Ching hexagram that shares this gate number.

activations.description: The 13 transiting bodies at this moment with the gate and line each currently activates. A transit is a single instant, so there is no Design side, only current positions.

gateA.description: First gate of the completed channel.

gateB.description: Second gate of the completed channel.

name.description: Name of the channel the transit temporarily completes.

circuit.description: Circuit family of the channel. One of Individual, Collective, Tribal.

centers.description: The two centers this channel connects and temporarily defines.

kind.description: How the transit completes the channel. personal means the natal chart already holds one gate and the transit supplies the other, the classic electromagnetic completion. educational means both gates are open in the natal chart and the transit supplies both at once.

natalGates.description: Gate or gates of this channel the natal chart already holds. Empty for an educational channel.

transitGates.description: Gate or gates of this channel supplied by the transit. One gate for a personal channel, both gates for an educational channel.

completedChannels.description: Channels the transit temporarily completes that the natal chart did not already define, each labelled personal or educational with the side that supplied each gate.

id.description: Center identifier. One of head, ajna, throat, g, heart, sacral, solar-plexus, spleen, root.

temporarilyDefined.description: Always true. The center is open in the natal chart and temporarily defined by a transit-completed channel for the duration of the transit.

temporaryCenters.description: Centers that are open in the natal chart and temporarily defined by a transit-completed channel.

summary.example: This transit completes 2 channels: 1 personal channel where the transit supplies the partner gate of a natal gate and 1 educational channel where the transit supplies both gates.
summary.description: Short factual summary of the overlay with channel and center counts only.

post.summary: Calculate Human Design type, authority and profile
post.description: Calculate the core Human Design identity from a birth moment: the energy type, the aura strategy, the inner authority, the signature and not-self themes, and the profile. The fast lookup for type-and-authority features without the full bodygraph payload. Verified against NASA JPL Horizons positions.

post.summary: Calculate the 26 Human Design gate activations
post.description: Calculate the 26 gate activations for a birth moment, split into the 13 conscious Personality activations at birth and the 13 unconscious Design activations 88 degrees of solar arc earlier. Each activation reports the planet, gate, line, gate keynote, and the matching I-Ching hexagram. Built for activation columns and detailed chart views.

schema.description: Response language (ISO 639-1). Supported: en, tr, de, es, hi, pt, fr, ru. Defaults to en. Languages without translations yet return English.

date.description: Birth date in YYYY-MM-DD format. The anchor for both the Personality activations at birth and the Design activations 88 degrees of solar arc earlier.

longitude.description: Birth longitude in decimal degrees. Optional and does not affect the bodygraph. Defaults to 0.

planet.description: Activating body. One of Sun, Earth, Moon, North Node, South Node, Mercury, Venus, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune, Pluto.

line.description: Line number from 1 to 6 within the gate, setting the line keynote and the profile.

number.description: I-Ching hexagram number, identical to the gate number it corresponds to.

english.description: English name of the corresponding I-Ching hexagram.

ichingHexagram.description: Cross-reference to the I-Ching hexagram that shares this gate number.

personality.description: The 13 conscious Personality activations computed at the exact birth moment, in black on a standard chart.

post.summary: Calculate the defined Human Design channels
post.description: Calculate the defined channels for a birth moment. A channel is defined when both of its gates are activated, and it wires together the two centers it connects. Returns each defined channel with its gates, name, circuit family, and connected centers, plus the full set of centers those channels define. Built for bodygraph rendering and definition analysis.

post.summary: Calculate the nine Human Design centers
post.description: Calculate the state of all nine Human Design centers for a birth moment: whether each is defined or open, whether it is a motor or an awareness center, its theme, and the active gates it holds. The data layer behind a rendered bodygraph where defined centers are colored and open centers are white.

schema.description: Response language (ISO 639-1). Supported: en, tr, de, es, hi, pt, fr, ru. Defaults to en. Languages without translations yet return English.

awareness.description: Whether this is an awareness center. The three awareness centers are Ajna, Solar Plexus, and Spleen.

theme.description: Theme text describing the center in its current defined or undefined state.

gates.description: Active gate numbers that sit in this center.

centers.description: All nine centers with their defined state and active gates.

post.summary: Calculate the Human Design profile and line keynotes
post.description: Calculate the Human Design profile for a birth moment: the conscious Personality Sun line over the unconscious Design Sun line, with the keynote for each. The profile is the geometry of the life role, for example 5/1 the Heretic Investigator. Verified against NASA JPL Horizons positions.

post.summary: Calculate Human Design Variables - The four arrows and Color, Tone, Base substructure
post.description: Calculate the four Human Design Variable arrows for a birth moment: Determination and Environment on the design side, Perspective and Motivation on the personality side. Each arrow returns its Color, Tone, and Base numbers from the hexagram-line substructure, the left or right direction set by the Tone, and the sourced Color and direction labels. This is the advanced Rave Variables and Primary Health System layer beneath Type, Strategy, Authority, and Profile. Color, Tone, and Base shift with tiny differences in birth time, so each arrow carries a confidence flag that turns false near a Color or Tone boundary, and a precise birth time is essential. Built for Human Design apps offering PHS, diet, environment, and Rave Psychology readings.

schema.description: Response language (ISO 639-1). Supported: en, tr, de, es, hi, pt, fr, ru. Defaults to en. Languages without translations yet return English.

parameters.description: Response language (ISO 639-1). Supported: en, tr, de, es, hi, pt, fr, ru. Defaults to en. Languages without translations yet return English.
parameters.name: lang

date.description: Birth date in YYYY-MM-DD format. The anchor for both the Personality activations at birth and the Design activations 88 degrees of solar arc earlier.

time.description: Birth time in 24-hour HH:MM:SS format. Precision matters: the profile lines and gate boundaries shift with the exact minute of birth.

timezone.description: Decimal hours (e.g. 5.5 for IST, -5 for EST) OR IANA name (e.g. "America/New_York", "UTC"). IANA is resolved to the DST-correct offset for the request date. Invalid timezones return 400 with a validation error.

latitude.description: Birth latitude in decimal degrees. Optional and does not affect the bodygraph, which depends only on ecliptic longitudes. Defaults to 0.

longitude.description: Birth longitude in decimal degrees. Optional and does not affect the bodygraph. Defaults to 0.

200.description: The four Variable arrows with substructure numbers, labels, and confidence flags

key.description: Stable arrow identifier. One of determination, environment, perspective, motivation.

name.description: Arrow name. Determination is the top-left arrow governing the Primary Health System and digestion, Environment the bottom-left arrow, Perspective the bottom-right arrow also called View, and Motivation the top-right arrow.

layer.description: Which half of the advanced layer the arrow belongs to. Primary Health System covers the body-side Determination and Environment arrows, Rave Psychology covers the mind-side Perspective and Motivation arrows.

position.description: Position of the arrow at the head of the bodygraph. One of Top left, Bottom left, Top right, Bottom right.

planet.description: Activating body whose substructure feeds this arrow. Determination and Motivation come from the Sun, Environment and Perspective from the North Node.

side.description: Chart side of the activation. Determination and Environment come from the design side, Perspective and Motivation from the personality side.

activation.description: The single activation, body and chart side, that this arrow is derived from.

color.description: Color number from 1 to 6, the substructure level one octave finer than the line. Color selects the arrow theme, for example the determination family or the motivation.

tone.description: Tone number from 1 to 6, the substructure level beneath Color. Tone sets the arrow direction: tones 1 to 3 face left, tones 4 to 6 face right.

base.description: Base number from 1 to 5, the finest published subdivision of the wheel. Returned for completeness but treated as informational, since it is finer than most birth times can resolve.

direction.description: Arrow direction derived from the Tone. left for tones 1 to 3, right for tones 4 to 6.

colorLabel.description: Name of the Color theme for this arrow, for example a determination family such as Touch, an environment such as Mountains, a perspective such as Personal, or a motivation such as Hope.

directionLabel.description: Keynote of the arrow direction for this arrow, for example Active or Passive for Determination, Focused or Peripheral for Perspective.

confident.description: Whether this arrow is far enough from a Color or Tone boundary to be reliable. When false the activation sits on a knife edge where the Color label or the arrow direction could flip with a more precise birth time, and the arrow should not be presented as fact.

arrows.description: The four Variable arrows: Determination and Environment from the design side, Perspective and Motivation from the personality side. Together they form the Rave Variables / Primary Health System layer that sits beneath Type, Strategy, Authority, and Profile.

confident.description: True only when all four arrows are confident. A single knife-edge arrow makes the whole configuration uncertain.

confidenceMarginDeg.description: Boundary margin in degrees of ecliptic longitude used for the per-arrow confidence flag, the solar arc over a few minutes of clock time. An activation within this distance of a Color or Tone boundary is flagged low-confidence.
